basic_details.job_title: NRLM Karnataka – Block Manager, Cluster Supervisor and More – 5 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Block Manager, Cluster Supervisor and More Posts. Candidates with Post Graduate,Any Graduation, M.sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 26-05-2026, and closes on 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NRLM Karnataka official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Management, Commerce, or Engineering, Any Graduation, M.Sc. (Agri) / B.Sc. (Agri) / Master degree in farm livelihoods

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NRLM Karnataka Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Block Manager, Cluster Supervisor and More Posts
